description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 98.

Heroic Path: Runeblood

Prerequisite: Barbarian, Druid, or Ranger Tier I: Living Rune

Runic Body. Ancient runes of power have drawn themselves across your skin, manifested by the primal power flowing through you. You gain resistance to one of the following damage types: acid, cold, fire, lightning, necrotic, poison, radiant, or thunder. These resistances apply to alternative forms, such as the ones created by the Wild Shape class feature. Additionally, your unarmed strikes and natural weapon attacks become magical.

Runic Boon. You gain one of the following runic boons, which is always active.

Rune of the Heart: If you start your turn with less than half your total hit points, you regain 10 hit points. +

Rune of the Wind: You gain a fly speed of 50 feet. +

Rune of the Deep: You gain a swim speed equal to your walking speed, can breathe underwater, and have resistance to cold damage.

Rune of the Earth: You cannot be knocked prone or moved against your will. You gain resistance to bludgeoning damage.

Rune of the Flame: You become immune to fire damage. +

Rune of the Dead: You become immune to necrotic damage. +

Rune of the Void: You gain darkvision out to a range of 120 feet. This darkvision is not impeded by magical darkness. The first time you damage a creature in a round of combat, it must succeed on a DC 25 Constitution saving throw or be unable to regain hit points until the start of your next turn.

Heroic Perk: Runic Awakening

Prerequisite: Living Rune

Your runes expand across your body, granting you access to an additional Runic Boon from your Living Rune Heroic Feat.

Tier II: Runic Conduit

Prerequisite: Living Rune, Runic Awakening

Ancient Warding. The runes etched into your skin protect you from the forces that shaped them. When a creature targets you with a spell of 5th level or lower, you can use your reaction to absorb it, nullifying its effects for you. Once you absorb a spell in this way, you cannot do so again until the start of your next turn.

Runic Sense. Your runes allow you to sense the magical properties of nearby effects and objects as if you were always under the Detect Magic spell.

Runic Boon. You gain an additional Runic Boon from your Living Rune feat.

Heroic Perk: Greater Runes

Prerequisite: Runic Conduit

Your chosen runes from your Living Rune feat gain improved effects, replacing the previous one.

Greater Rune of the Heart: You regain 10 hit points at the start of each of your turns. +

Greater Rune of the Wind: You gain a fly speed of 100 feet. +

Greater Rune of the Deep: You gain a swim speed equal to thrice your walking speed, can breathe underwater, and have immunity to cold damage.

Greater Rune of the Earth: You cannot be knocked prone, shoved or moved. You gain resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage.

Greater Rune of the Flame: You become immune to fire damage. When you take fire damage, you regain an amount of hit points equal to half the fire damage taken.

Greater Rune of the Dead: You become immune to necrotic damage and resistant to dark damage. When you take necrotic damage, you regain an amount of hit points equal to half the necrotic damage taken.

Greater Rune of the Void: You gain darkvision out to a range of 180 feet. This darkvision is not impeded by magical darkness and you can perceive color irrespective of lighting conditions. The first time you damage a creature in a round of combat, it must succeed on a DC 30 Constitution saving throw or be unable to regain hit points until the start of your next turn.

Tier III: Runeblood

Prerequisite: Greater Runes

World Rune. You gain access to two additional Greater Runic Boons from your Greater Runes heroic perk, for a total of 5.

Limited Magic Immunity. You cannot be affected or detected by spells and magical effects of 7th-level or lower unless you wish to be.

Path Connections Unbreakable. Instead of the Greater Runes Heroic Perk, you can take the Stone Body Perk, changing to the Unbreakable path.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
